en: Take my money, don't want it, no.
ko: 그러니까 내 돈 받아, 필요 없어, 안 돼
ja: だから俺の金を持ってけ、いらない
zhTW: 所以拿走我的錢，不要了，不
vi: Vay hay lay tien cua toi, khong can, khong

en: It's all I want to do with you.
ko: 그게 내가 너와 함께 하고 싶은 전부야
ja: それが君としたいことの全部
zhTW: 那就是我想和你做的全部
vi: Do la tat ca nhung gi toi muon lam voi ban

en: You're a lucky star, shining in a bankrupt sky.
ja: 破産した空に輝いてる
vi: Toa sang tren bau troi pha san

en: And I'm just a guy, that wants to be with you tonight.
ko: 나는 그냥 너와 함께하고 싶은 남자야
ja: 今夜君と一緒にいたい
vi: Muon o ben ban dem nay

en: And if you break my heart, then maybe it was worth it too.
ko: 만약 네가 내 마음을 아프게 한다면
ja: それだけの価値があったかもしれない
vi: Thi co le no cung dang

en: Cause now you know how I feel, and I can't hide it.
ja: これで俺の気持ちがわかるだろ
zhTW: 現在你知道我的感覺了
vi: Bay gio ban biet toi cam thay the nao

en: Baby, you're priceless, I've never had anything like this.
ja: こんなもの持ったことない
zhTW: 我從來沒有過這樣的東西
vi: Toi chua tung co gi nhu the nay

en: I'm resting my head on your thighs, it's all I want to do with you.
ko: 네 허벅지에 머리를 기대고 있어, 이건
ja: 君の太ももに頭を預けて

en: It's all I want to do with you. Doubt it, I've never seen anything like it.
ja: こんなの見たことない
zhTW: 我從沒見過這樣的東西
vi: Toi chua tung thay gi nhu the

en: Take my money, don't want it, no.
ko: 그러니까 내 돈 받아, 필요 없어, 안 돼
ja: だから俺の金を持ってけ、いらない
zhTW: 所以拿走我的錢，不要了，不
vi: Vay hay lay tien cua toi, khong can, khong

en: It's all I want to do with you. It's all I want to do with you.
ja: それが君としたいことの全部
zhTW: 那就是我想和你做的全部
vi: Do la tat ca nhung gi toi muon lam voi ban
